Not the recipe title (outside itemscope)

Classic Beef Chili

Slow-simmered, deeply spiced chili.

Author: Jane Cook
6 servings Tex-Mex

Ingredients

  • 2 lbs ground beef
  • 1 onion, chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 tbsp chili powder
  • 1 can kidney beans, drained
  • 1 can crushed tomatoes

Instructions

  1. Brown the beef with onion and garlic.
  2. Stir in chili powder, beans, and tomatoes.
  3. Simmer 90 minutes, stirring occasionally.
